team_name: VerdictAI — Criterion-Aware Tender Evaluation with Explainable Verdicts and Institutional Memory
summary: Design a technical platform to understand tenders, evaluate eligibility, and produce explainable reports for government procurement using VerdictAI.
optimization_claims: Never-silent guarantee: any mandatory-criterion FAIL routes to mandatory review before commitment
CPM context: up to 3 matching precedents from same department with tender IDs
constraints_addressed: No institutional memory — similar works is interpreted differently by every evaluator. No record of how that phrase was resolved in prior tenders from the same department.
No reproducible trace — a CVC complaint cannot be answered with a criterion-level record linking each verdict to a specific document, page, and value. Committee minutes are not an audit trail.
No protection against silent errors — misread turnover figures, expired certificates, wrong measurement periods propagate to the final evaluation undetected.
